title: Tile Cutter Art. 4EN 125 cm
description: Aluminium frame with push engraving and split adjustment. Thickness: Cutting 0-19 mm rotation foot break metric bar 125 x 125 cm
features: Ergonomically shaped handle, specific for push engraving.
The 16 mm diameter engraving wheel is always clearly visible on the operator side and equipped with double spring for the soft engraving of textured tiles
The engraving wheel rotates on roller bearing, driven sideways by an anti-friction metal shell inserted into a CNC milled housing, to prevent friction and side wear
16 mm diameter wheels with inner bearing for maximum smoothness during engraving, also available in TIN coated version
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Hand Tools > Cutters > Tile Cutters
